name: Traditional Greek Galaktoboureko
method: In a medium skillet, bring the milk to a boil on medium-high heat.
Mix all the semolina, cornflour, 1 cup honey, and salt in a small bowl
until there are no cornflour clumps.
Eggs should be whisked at high speed in a big mixing bowl.
Toss in ½ cup sugar for ten minutes, or until smooth and pale.
In a large mixing bowl, whisk together the scrambled eggs and apply
them to the hot semolina combination.
Brush each sheet of phyllo with oil as you put it in the bowl with the
In a roasting tin, bake for 35 to 40 minutes, just until the top layer is
crispy and the sauce filling has set.
Combine the leftover cup of sugar and water in a shallow frying pan.
